steps.title: Find the causal signal
steps.content:
The passage explains why the speeds differ: flying features limit top speeds less than swimming features do.

The blank requires a word showing how the speed difference relates to this fact.

The phrase “largely ______ of the fact that” signals a causal relationship—the difference must be a result of these structural features.

steps.title: Match the causal word
steps.content:
A consequence directly captures this relationship—the speed difference is a result that flows from the stated structural differences.

The alternatives all miss the causal logic: objective denotes a goal, repudiation expresses rejection, and explanation reverses the direction.
That confirms A is correct.
